nasb.text: “Then I said, ‘How I would set you among My sons And give you a pleasant land, The most beautiful inheritance of the nations!’ And I said, ‘You shall call Me, My Father, And not turn away from following Me.’

esv.text: “‘I said, How I would set you among my sons, and give you a pleasant land, a heritage most beautiful of all nations. And I thought you would call me, My Father, and would not turn from following me.

cnv.text: “我說： ‘我待你，像待兒女一樣， 賜給你佳美之地， 就是列國中最美好的產業； 我以為你會稱我為父， 不再離去不跟從我了。

ccb.text: “我曾想，我多么愿意把你们当成我的儿女， 赐给你们万国中最肥美的土地。 我原以为你们会叫我‘父亲’， 再不离弃我。
